step1.title: Navigation Bar
step1.desc: This is the main sidebar — where you can quickly access all features: Home, Inbox, Time Tracking, and AI.

step2.title: Manage Spaces
step2.desc: Organize projects by Spaces. Each Space contains Folders, Lists, and Tasks — helping you manage work systematically.

step3.title: Workspace Area
step3.desc: This is the main area to view and manage tasks, boards, and sprints. All content will be displayed here.

step4.title: AI Assistant
step4.desc: Flowise AI helps you create tasks, generate reports, and provide smart suggestions using natural language.

step5.title: Settings
step5.desc: Customize your profile, appearance, language, and security here. You can switch to Vietnamese anytime!

workspace.noWorkspace: No workspace yet. Create one below.

errors.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

ai.inputPlaceholder: Get instant answers, insights, and ideas.
